arts.ttl: Sven Botman's reaction to returning to Newcastle United training and Howe's mind-blowing record
arts.sum: Anybody doubting he is the right man for the job need only look at his 48% win ratio in the dugout at St James' Park with only Kevin Keegan bettering it during the Premier League years. The former Newcastle defender was celebrating his move to Wigan on Friday after being handed a deal until January and squad number 45.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's £28 million gamble provides decade long England problem
arts.sum: The former Chelsea full-back has played 13 times for The Magpies and was expected by most to be included in Lee Carsley's final England squad. "Hall is in very good form, and Lee Carsley knows him from the age groups, and has been thinking about him.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United summer arrival worth every penny as unseen work pays off
arts.sum: This time around, Newcastle are managing their load a lot better - both due to a less hectic schedule and the summer appointment of performance specialist James Bunce. Eddie Howe isn't getting too far ahead of himself as Newcastle United reap the rewards of a notable decrease in their injury issues compared to last season.

arts.ttl: 'When I was a kid': Elliot Anderson admits what he actually used to think about Nottingham Forest
Jose Mourinho banned for astonishing rant about Turkish referees amid Newcastle United link
arts.sum: In his controversial interview, the ex-Chelsea, Real Madrid, and Manchester United manager, who witnessed his team concede two penalties, targeted VAR Atilla Karaoglan, stating: "I know what I was told even before I came. Alongside the penalties levelled at Mourinho, Fenerbahce's vice-president Acun Ilicali – who also owns Championship team Hull City – was hit with a 400,000 Turkish Lira fine (approximately £9,000) for "unsportsmanlike remarks".

arts.ttl: The double dose of good news for Newcastle United after international break
arts.sum: The club's trip to Riyadh will see Newcastle granted exclusive access to PIF-owned side Al Nassr's Al-Awwal Park and that will see both Trippier and Wilson benefit from the medical facilities on offer, deemed good enough for Portugal legend Ronaldo of course! Speaking about the trip to Riyadh, Howe said: "The plan is to get some warm weather training in.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United ditch luxury for Cristiano Ronaldo visit as Eddie Howe seeks another PIF boost
arts.sum: Eddie Howe's side are no strangers to this sort of trip after previously jetting to Jeddah and Riyadh in Saudi, as well as Dubai for a period of sunshine while Premier League action is suspended. PIF's investment in the club in recent years was part of a mammoth push to make the Saudi Pro League one of the best in the world as the country bid to host the 2034 World Cup.

arts.ttl: Jose Mourinho move throws up Eddie Howe question as Newcastle eye progression
arts.sum: News of former Chelsea and Manchester United manager Jose Mourinho eyeing the Newcastle United job does not add more pressure to Eddie Howe, fans believe. The speculation surrounding Mourinho doesn't spell danger for the Englishman either, though, with fans believing Howe's position does not alter.

arts.ttl: 'Like Ronaldo': Elliot Anderson left seriously impressed by one player at Nottingham Forest
Preview: Santa Clara vs. Vitoria de Guimaraes - prediction, team news, lineups
